prestazioni: Engine: Alfa Romeo 690B 2.5L V6 (90° DOHC, 24V) with forged internals, including Mahle Motorsport pistons (88mm bore, 10.5:1 CR), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft (78mm stroke) for 10,500 RPM reliability. Twin Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbochargers (0.82 A/R, 60mm compressor wheels) with TiAL MV-R 38mm wastegates and custom 3.5" stainless steel equal-length exhaust manifolds (TIG-welded, Inconel 625) for optimized spool and 650+ HP at 1.8 bar boost.

Drivetrain: Xtrac 6-speed sequential transaxle (P1046, DTM-spec) with a Sachs triple-plate carbon clutch (240mm, 3,000 Nm torque capacity) and a Quaife ATB differential (85% lock) paired with a custom 4.11:1 final drive ratio for 0-100 km/h in 2.9s. Reinforced half-shafts (GKN Lobro, 30-spline) with spherical rod ends and a Drexler Motorsport differential cover (aluminum, finned) for thermal management.

Suspension & Chassis: Ohlins TTX40 4-way adjustable coilovers (250mm stroke, 12-position rebound/compression) with spherical bearing top mounts (Alfa Romeo Motorsport-spec) and Eibach ERS 1,200 lb/in springs. Front: custom tubular steel subframe (4130 chromoly) with spherical bearing control arms (Alfa Corse) and 32mm anti-roll bar (adjustable, rose-jointed). Rear: multi-link setup with rose-jointed toe links (Alfa Romeo DTM kit) and a 28mm anti-roll bar. Brembo GT-R monoblock calipers (6-piston front, 4-piston rear) with 380mm CCM-R discs (2-piece, floating) and Ferodo DS3000 pads.
estetica: Aerodynamics: Carbon fiber DTM-spec front splitter (Alfa Romeo Motorsport, 30mm overhang) with integrated dive planes and a 3D-printed NACA duct (ABS, 50mm depth) for brake cooling. Rear wing: carbon fiber DTM-style wing (2.2m span, 300mm chord) with Gurney flap (20mm) and adjustable angle of attack (0-15°). Side skirts: carbon-Kevlar hybrid (Alfa Corse, 50mm extension) with vortex generators (5mm height, 100mm spacing). Underbody: full flat floor with diffuser (carbon fiber, 300mm exit height) and titanium stay rods (M8, grade 5).

Bodywork: Carbon fiber widebody kit (Rocket Bunny V3, 155-specific) with extended fenders (50mm front, 70mm rear) and custom carbon fiber hood (30% weight reduction, 2x 80mm vents for intercooler airflow). Rear bumper: carbon fiber DTM replica (Alfa Romeo Classic Parts) with integrated tow hook and 100mm exhaust outlets (Inconel, dual-wall). Mirrors: carbon fiber racing mirrors (OMP, DTM-spec) with quick-release mounts and integrated turn signals (LED, 1W).

Interior: Full FIA-spec roll cage (T45 steel, 2.5mm wall thickness) with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360, 4kg Novec 1230) and Sparco Pro 2000 seats (carbon-Kevlar, 6-point harness). Steering wheel: MOMO DTM Prototipo (350mm, suede) with integrated shift lights (RGB, 12-segment) and quick-release hub (NRG). Dash: AIM MXS Strada (10Hz GPS, 4.3" display) with custom Alfa Romeo 155 DTM CAN bus integration (engine temps, boost, oil pressure). Pedal box: Tilton 6000 series (aluminum, adjustable) with carbon fiber heel plate.
